The WatchGuard Endpoint Security Management API provides RESTful access to WatchGuard Endpoint Security (WES) features including device management, security events, risk assessment, configuration management, and license information. All endpoints require OAuth 2.0 bearer authentication and the WatchGuard-API-Key header.
